verses.1: Give thanks to the LORD, for He is good, For His faithfulness is everlasting.
verses.2: Give thanks to the God of gods, For His faithfulness is everlasting.
verses.3: Give thanks to the Lord of lords, For His faithfulness is everlasting.
verses.4: To Him who alone does great wonders, For His faithfulness is everlasting;
verses.5: To Him who made the heavens with skill, For His faithfulness is everlasting;
verses.6: To Him who spread out the earth above the waters, For His faithfulness is everlasting;
verses.7: To Him who made the great lights, For His faithfulness is everlasting:
verses.8: The sun to rule by day, For His faithfulness is everlasting,
verses.9: The moon and stars to rule by night, For His faithfulness is everlasting.
verses.10: To Him who struck the Egyptians, that is, their firstborn, For His faithfulness is everlasting,
verses.11: And brought Israel out from their midst, For His faithfulness is everlasting,
verses.12: With a strong hand and an outstretched arm, For His faithfulness is everlasting.
verses.13: To Him who divided the Red Sea in parts, For His faithfulness is everlasting,
verses.14: And allowed Israel to pass through the midst of it, For His faithfulness is everlasting;
verses.15: But He overthrew Pharaoh and his army in the Red Sea, For His faithfulness is everlasting.
verses.16: To Him who led His people through the wilderness, For His faithfulness is everlasting;
verses.17: To Him who struck great kings, For His faithfulness is everlasting,
verses.18: And brought death to mighty kings, For His faithfulness is everlasting:
verses.19: Sihon, king of the Amorites, For His faithfulness is everlasting,
verses.20: And Og, king of Bashan, For His faithfulness is everlasting,
verses.21: And gave their land as an inheritance, For His faithfulness is everlasting,
verses.22: An inheritance to His servant Israel, For His faithfulness is everlasting.
verses.23: Who remembered us in our lowliness, For His faithfulness is everlasting,
verses.24: And has rescued us from our enemies, For His faithfulness is everlasting;
verses.25: Who gives food to all flesh, For His faithfulness is everlasting.
verses.26: Give thanks to the God of heaven, For His faithfulness is everlasting.
